LAW AND MOTION 301, DEFENDANT CALIFORNIA PACIFIC MEDICAL CENTER'S MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT IS GRANTED. THE ONE-INCH DISPLACEMENT IS NOT SUBSTANTIAL AS A MATTER OF LAW, ESPECIALLY GIVEN THAT THE DISPARITY WAS APPARENT AS PLAINTIFF APPROACHED AND THAT THERE ARE NO OTHER FACTORS TO INCREASE THE DANGER. PREVAILING PARTY IS TO SUBMIT A PROPOSED FORM OF ORDER PURSUANT TO CCP 437 C(G). JUDGE: PETER J. BUSCH, REPORTER: CANDACE YOUNT, CSR #2737
